# Phoenix Bankruptcy -- Chapter 7 & 13 Filing Guide [2026]
> Free Phoenix bankruptcy guide for 2026. Compare Chapter 7 vs Chapter 13, local exemptions, filing costs, means test, and what to expect in your case.

## About
phoenixbankruptcy.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Phoenix Bankruptcy -- Chapter 7 & 13 Filing Guide: https://phoenixbankruptcy.org/
- Chapter 7 Bankruptcy in Phoenix -- Eligibility, Exemptions, Timeline: https://phoenixbankruptcy.org/chapter-7.html
- Chapter 13 Bankruptcy in Phoenix -- Payment Plans, Dismissal Rates, Timeline: https://phoenixbankruptcy.org/chapter-13.html
